scenarios.name: planning_pressure_5_users
scenarios.failed_requests_billable_assumption: Only attempts that reach the upstream provider are counted; retry_multiplier covers billable retry exposure.
scenarios.primary_risk: No real user average exists; high-active behavior and retry rate are assumptions.
